name: unusual-code-content
note: Code-content policy split: a text edit inside a FENCED block is mark-ineligible and refuses honestly (pre-fix this CORRUPTED by duplicating text), while INLINE code text lives in a normal paragraph and accepts tracked formatting — ReviewableCode exists precisely so inline code participates in format suggestions.
docMarkdown:
Setup guide.

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

Inline `npm test` runs the suite.
